leadText: The Picnic Set (Japanese: ピクニックセット Picnic Set) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Picnic Set allows the player to set up picnics from the menu.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A roomy basket packed with all sorts of things for use when enjoying picnicking with your Pokémon.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Picnic Set allows the player to set up picnics from the menu. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A roomy basket packed with all sorts of things for use when enjoying picnicking with your Pokémon. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Mesagoza (automatically obtained after beginning the Treasure Hunt)
